text: Key risks merit explicit acknowledgment. Financial leverage presents a material concern, with a debt-to-equity ratio of 2.33 as of Q3 2025, indicating sensitivity to interest rate and credit cycle fluctuations. Net interest margin compression remains relevant given the bank's diversified business model across Consumer Banking, Global Banking, and Global Markets segments. Additionally, competitive dynamics in wealth management remain active, with recent reports of UBS recruiting Merrill Lynch teams managing approximately $1 billion in assets.
